attributes.Sql Query:

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_FUNDINGS STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_FUNDINGS,
 (
 select PROJECT_FUNDING_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_FUNDINGS
 minus
 select PROJECT_FUNDING_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_FUNDINGS
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.PROJECT_FUNDING_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_FUNDINGS.PROJECT_FUNDING_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_FUNDINGS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_FUNDINGS)
